name: Pepe Jeans London Ladies Cocktail 3pc Gift Set Fragrances 8436581947434
description.complete:
Transport yourself to a tropical paradise with the enchanting Pepe Jeans London Ladies Cocktail for Her Gift Set. Launched in 2019, this exquisite fragrance collection is designed to captivate and uplift your senses. Perfectly curated by the renowned design house Pepe Jeans London, this set includes a 30ml Eau de Toilette, a 50ml Body Milk, and a 50ml Shower Gel, offering an all-encompassing aromatic experience.

The journey begins with the invigorating top notes of luscious pineapple, juicy raspberry, vibrant blueberry, and rich cassis, creating a refreshing introduction that immediately draws you in. At the heart of this fragrance, the delicate tiare flower and zesty lemon blossom blend seamlessly, adding a touch of floral elegance that exudes femininity and charm.

As the scent unfolds, the base notes of spun sugar, sensual musk, warm amber, and creamy sandalwood leave a lingering trail of sweetness and sophistication. This unique combination provides a lasting impression that is both comforting and alluring, making it an ideal choice for any occasion.

Whether you're treating yourself or gifting a loved one, the Pepe Jeans London Ladies Cocktail Gift Set is a delightful choice that celebrates individuality and style. Embrace the essence of this captivating fragrance and let it become a staple in your daily routine. Dive into the world of Pepe Jeans London and discover the magic of Cocktail for Her today.

name: Risala Men's Elite Hikmah Of Life EDP Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 6294015196894
description.complete:
Experience the bold and sophisticated essence of Risala Men's Elite Hikmah Of Life, a captivating Middle Eastern fragrance crafted to leave a lasting impression. Designed in the heart of the United Arab Emirates, this 3.4 oz Eau de Parfum blends rich, invigorating notes that embody confidence and refinement.

The scent opens with a vibrant burst of bergamot, grapefruit, and blackcurrant, delivering a fresh and energizing introduction. As it evolves, the heart reveals a dynamic fusion of ginger, ambrette, vetiver, green mandarin, and geranium, creating a bold and charismatic character. Finally, the base unfolds with warm and woody tones of dry woods, cashmeran, fir balsam, cedarwood, tonka, patchouli, and vetiver, leaving a deep, sophisticated trail that lingers.

Perfect for the modern man, Elite Hikmah Of Life is an expression of strength and elegance. Whether for daily wear or special occasions, this fragrance exudes confidence and charm. Elevate your scent collection with this expertly crafted blend from Risala, a brand known for its luxurious and long-lasting fragrances.

name: BDK Parfums Unisex Vanille Leather EDP Spray 3.3 oz (Tester) Fragrances
description.complete:
Step into a world of elegance and allure with BDK Parfums Vanille Leather Eau de Parfum. Launched in 2023, this unisex fragrance blends warm, floral, and spicy notes into a bold and unforgettable scent. Created by the design house of BDK Parfums, Vanille Leather is a modern masterpiece that speaks to those who love a perfect harmony between softness and strength.

The fragrance opens with a bright burst of violet and pink pepper, offering a fresh yet spicy start that instantly captures attention. As it settles, a blooming heart of jasmine, tuberose, and orange blossom emerges, adding a touch of creamy floral richness. These middle notes bring a sense of sophistication and depth that feels both classic and contemporary.

At its base, Vanille Leather reveals a warm and earthy blend of vanilla, orris, benzoin, leather, oak, and patchouli. These grounding elements create a luxurious dry down that lingers on the skin, leaving a memorable trail. It’s the perfect balance of sweet and smoky, making it a versatile scent for any season or occasion.

This Eau de Parfum comes in a 3.3 oz Tester size, offering the same exceptional quality and scent as the standard version but at greater value. Whether you're exploring a new signature scent or adding to your fragrance collection, BDK Parfums Vanille Leather is a smart and stylish choice.

name: Dumont Men's Scapler EDP Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 3760060761569
description.complete:
Discover the captivating essence of Dumont's Scapler, a sophisticated men's fragrance designed to leave a lasting impression. This exquisite Eau de Parfum Spray comes in a generous 3.4 oz bottle, perfect for those who appreciate luxury and refinement. The expertly crafted scent is a remarkable blend of invigorating top notes, heart notes, and base notes, creating a fragrance that is both timeless and modern.

The top notes of bergamot, lavender, and apple offer a refreshing and energizing start, awakening your senses with a burst of freshness. As the fragrance unfolds, the heart notes of watermelon, cedar wood, and calamus bring a unique and captivating depth. These elements harmonize seamlessly, creating a scent that is as intriguing as it is delightful.

Finally, the base notes of sandalwood, patchouli, and amber provide a warm and sensual finish, leaving a memorable trail. This combination evokes a sense of confidence and elegance, making Dumont's Scapler the perfect choice for the discerning gentleman.

Crafted by the renowned design house of Dumont, Scapler is more than just a fragrance; it's a statement. Whether you're heading to a business meeting or a night out, this perfume enhances your presence with its sophisticated aroma. Embrace the allure of Dumont Men's Scapler EDP Spray and experience a fragrance that speaks to your inner confidence and style.

This item is only valid for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada.

name: Fumeri Unisex Gris EDP Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 6297001612231
description.complete:
Experience the perfect balance of sophistication and modern elegance with Fumeri Gris Eau de Parfum. Designed for those who appreciate refined scents, this unisex fragrance captivates the senses with its harmonious blend of fresh, aromatic, and woody notes.

The journey begins with a vibrant burst of bergamot, grapefruit, and pink pepper, creating an invigorating and slightly spicy opening. As the scent unfolds, the heart reveals a smooth blend of lavender, violet leaf, and sage, adding a touch of herbal depth and softness. Finally, the base notes of cedarwood, musk, and vetiver provide a warm and grounding finish, ensuring a long-lasting and unforgettable impression.

Crafted by the prestigious design house Fumeri, Gris is a fragrance that embodies confidence and versatility. Whether you're heading to an important meeting or a casual evening out, this Eau de Parfum adapts effortlessly to any occasion. With its 3.4 oz size, it's perfect for daily wear or special moments that call for a signature scent.

name: Star Wars Men's The Dark Side EDT Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 815940025255
description.complete:

The Dark Side EDT Spray for men opens up a galaxy of scintillating top notes that include the invigorating blend of orange, aldehydes, and grapefruit. These refreshing scents create an uplifting aura that leaves a lasting impression.

This fragrance's heart notes are a mesmerizing bouquet of cloves, rose, violet, and magnolia. This aromatic blend adds a touch of romantic sophistication that perfectly complements the boldness of the top notes. It's a sensory experience that transports you to a serene, floral landscape.

Finally, the base notes of dark chocolate, vanilla, amber, patchouli, cedar, and vetiver emerge to round out this scent. These earthy, sweet tones add depth and warmth to the fragrance, creating a soothing, lingering aroma that is truly irresistible.

Our Star Wars Men's The Dark Side EDT Spray is an elegant perfume that comes in a size of 3.4 oz. It's a perfect choice for the man who appreciates the power of a unique, well-rounded fragrance. Its barcode is 815940025255, making it easy to identify this exceptional scent. Give yourself the advantage of a distinctive fragrance that reflects the enigma and allure of the iconic Star Wars saga.

Embrace your dark side with our Star Wars Men's The Dark Side EDT Spray. This fragrance is not just a scent; it's an experience that truly transcends the ordinary.

Introducing the Lattafa Khamrah Qahwa, a captivating fragrance launched in 2023. Designed by the renowned Middle Eastern fragrance house, Lattafa, this EDP spray comes in a generous 3.4 oz size, ensuring you can enjoy its luxurious scent for a long time.

The top notes of Khamrah Qahwa are a delightful blend of Cardamom, Ginger, and Cinnamon. These spices create an invigorating and warm opening that immediately captivates the senses. As the fragrance develops, the heart notes reveal a sweet and floral combination of Praline, White flowers, and Candied fruits. With its unique blend of spicy, sweet, and gourmand notes, Lattafa Khamrah Qahwa is a versatile fragrance suitable for any occasion. Whether you're heading to a special event or simply want to feel luxurious every day, this unisex scent is sure to leave a lasting impression. Plus, it is available for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada, making it accessible for fragrance lovers in these regions.

name: Rosendo Mateu Unisex Sweet Rose EDP Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 8436018276373
description.complete:
Experience the alluring blend of fruity top notes and aromatic heart notes with the Rosendo Mateu Unisex Black Collection Sweet Rose EDP Fragrance. Launched in 2020 by the esteemed design house, Rosendo Mateu, this captivating perfume is a unique fusion of enchanting scents that is perfect for both men and women.

The fragrance first greets you with a delightful mélange of top notes, featuring the exotic passionfruit, the sweet and juicy strawberry, succulent red berries, tangy raspberry, invigorating Calabrian bergamot, and refreshing green leaves. These luscious fruity scents create a captivating and invigorating start to this fragrance journey.

The heart notes of Sweet Rose perfume are where the fragrance truly lives up to its name. The core of this perfume is a romantic blend of classic rose, exotic Bulgarian rose, and opulent Turkish rose, intertwined with the subtly sweet scent of geranium. This floral bouquet creates a heart that is both sophisticated and timeless.

The base notes consist of a warm and sensual combination of white musk, musk, creamy vanilla, robust cedar, exotic sandalwood, and earthy vetiver. These notes blend seamlessly to provide a velvety finish that lingers all day, making Sweet Rose a fragrance that is truly unforgettable.

With its barcode 8436018276373, the Rosendo Mateu Unisex Black Collection Sweet Rose EDP Fragrance is an authentic perfume that exudes elegance and sophistication. It is more than just a scent - it is an experience, a memory, and an extension of your personality. Whether you're at work, out for an evening, or simply enjoying a quiet day at home, Sweet Rose is the perfect companion.

Indulge in the elegance of Sweet Rose, and let this unique unisex fragrance from Rosendo Mateu make every moment special.

name: Alyssa Ashley Ladies White Musk EDC 3.4 oz (Tester) Fragrances 3495080307229
description.complete:
Immerse yourself in the timeless and elegant scent of Alyssa Ashley's White Musk, a luxurious Ladies EDC perfume. Crafted for the sophisticated woman, this exquisite fragrance was launched in the year 2000 and continues to captivate with its unique blend of notes.

White Musk opens with the delightful top notes of bergamot and tarragon, teasing the senses with their refreshing and invigorating aroma. It then transitions smoothly into the heart notes, where the floral ensemble of lilac, jasmine, ylang-ylang, and rose unfurls. This intoxicating bouquet imparts a romantic and dreamy quality that beautifully complements the feminine allure.

The base notes of musk and patchouli provide a warm and sensual finish, anchoring the fragrance with their earthy depth and richness. The musk, in particular, is a signature element, lending its name to this iconic scent and imbuing it with a classic and timeless appeal.

Presented in a 3.4 oz tester size, this Alyssa Ashley Ladies White Musk EDC is perfect for those who wish to try out this fragrance and experience its unique charm. With the barcode 3495080307229, this perfume falls under the category of EDC fragrances, hinting at a light, yet lasting scent that will accompany you throughout the day.

Experience the captivating allure of Alyssa Ashley Ladies White Musk EDC 3.4 oz (Tester) Fragrances 3495080307229. This fragrance embodies the essence of femininity and sophistication, making it a must-have addition to every woman's fragrance collection.

This item is only valid for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada.

name: Salvatore Ferragamo - Incanto Heaven Golden Petals Edition Eau De Toilette Spray  30ml/1oz
description.complete:
Discover the enchanting allure of Salvatore Ferragamo's Incanto Heaven Golden Petals Edition, a floral fruity fragrance crafted exclusively for ladies. This exquisite 1.0 oz perfume captures the essence of modern femininity with its fresh, zesty, and sweet aroma, perfect for those who embrace life's vibrant moments.

At the heart of this delightful scent are top notes of invigorating yuzu, juicy bergamot, and crisp apple, creating a succulent and refreshing introduction. As the fragrance unfolds, the heart reveals a bouquet of wild rose and water lily, adding a touch of elegance and grace. The journey concludes with a warm, comforting base of cedar and musk, leaving a lasting impression that is both captivating and sophisticated.

Launched in 2016 as a limited edition, Incanto Heaven Golden Petals Edition is an ideal choice for spring or summer wear. Its lively and radiant composition makes it a perfect companion for sunny days and blossoming adventures. Embrace the magic of this unique scent and let your spirit shine with every spritz.

This item is only valid for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada.

description.complete:
Embrace your masculinity with the invigorating scent of New Brand's Master Zap, a perfume specifically designed for men. This extraordinary EDT spray, bottled in a 3.4 oz size, is bursting with a unique blend of vibrant top notes and addictive base notes, perfectly balanced to create a compelling fragrance that's sure to impress.

Master Zap instantly captures your senses with its lively top notes of fresh lime and exotic elemi, bringing a zesty and invigorating start to your olfactory experience. This captivating introduction entwines with the heart notes of fruity essences, aromatic artemisia, crisp apple, spicy cardamom, and warm ginger. Such a diverse concoction of scents adds an exciting twist, making this fragrance an intriguing pick for the adventurous man.

As the fragrance settles, the base notes of rich myrrh, sensual musk, indulgent gourmand, and woody undertones take center stage. These notes leave a lasting impression, echoing the strength and depth of modern masculinity. They add a touch of sophistication and create a warm, enticing trail that lingers throughout the day.

Designed by the design house of New Brand, Master Zap is a testament to their innovative approach to creating exceptional fragrances. This men's EDT spray, with barcode 5425039220420, is part of their distinguished perfume collection. It's a perfect choice for the man who appreciates a scent as bold and unique as he is. Experience the allure of Master Zap, a fragrance that truly embodies the essence of manhood.

name: Sapil Ladies Pink Nancy EDP 1.7 oz Fragrances 6295124002175
description.complete:
Experience the enchanting allure of Sapil's Pink Nancy, a captivating ladies' Eau de Parfum (EDP) designed to inspire and captivate. Enjoy the luxury and sophistication of a fragrance that was launched in 2004 by the renowned design house, Sapil. With a size of 1.7 oz, Pink Nancy is perfect for everyday use yet special enough for those memorable occasions.

Belonging to the Floral fragrance family, Pink Nancy delicately intertwines floral and fruity notes to create a unique olfactory experience. The top notes open with an exquisite blend of floral scents, immediately evoking an image of a blossoming garden. description.complete:
Step into a world of elegance and allure with Tova Beverly Hills Nights Body Mist for Ladies. Launched in 1997, this timeless fragrance is a true classic from the heart of the United States. Wrapped in a graceful Floral Green scent family, Nights captures the essence of sophistication, designed especially for women who love to feel confident, fresh, and irresistible.

description.complete:
Discover the captivating allure of Afnan's Pride My Oud, a sophisticated men's fragrance that embodies the essence of the Amber Woody family. This Eau de Parfum, part of the esteemed Rue Broca collection, comes in a generous 3.4 oz bottle, perfect for those who appreciate a long-lasting and memorable scent.

Crafted by the renowned design house of Afnan, based in the United Arab Emirates, Pride My Oud is a testament to Middle Eastern fragrance expertise. The top notes of Saffron, Labdanum, Pepper, and Cumin create an intriguing and spicy introduction that instantly captures attention. As the fragrance unfolds, the heart notes of Rose, Violet, and Patchouli leaf deliver a rich and floral bouquet, adding depth and complexity.

The base notes of Agarwood (Oud) and Oriental notes provide a warm and enduring finish, making Pride My Oud an unforgettable scent that lingers on the skin. This fragrance is designed for men who appreciate the finer things in life and aren't afraid to stand out with a bold and distinctive aroma.

name: Citizen Calibre 9000 Minute Repeater Two-Tone Steel Men's Watch BL9004-58P
description.complete: Calibre 9000 Collection. Perpetual Calendar Automatically Adjusts for Odd and Even Months and Leap Years through 2100. Minute repeater function. How the repeater chime function works: Press and hold the button at the 2 o'clock position until it starts to chime. First you will hear one long tone for each hour, then each quarter hour have a quick double chime, then each minute will have single short tones. For example, if the time is 2:48, you will hear two long chimes for the hour, then 3 quick double chimes to indicate 45 minutes (three 15 minute periods), bringing the time to 2:45, then 3 quick chimes for 3 minutes past the last quarter hour, indicating 48 minutes after 2. The minute repeater does not differentiate between AM or PM time. Eco-Drive Technology - Charges in Sunlight or Indoors - No Batteries to Change. Black outer dial with White inner dial and gold tone hands. Luminous hands and markers. When Fully Charged has a 270 Day Power Reserve. Solid Stainless Steel Case and bracelet. Hidden push-button deployment clasp. Dual Time. 2 Alarms. Low Charge Indicator & Time Reset Advisory in the Event it Ever Needs Charging. Non-reflective scratch-resistant mineral crystal. Water resistant to 30m. Case measures 42mm wide by 14mm thick. 5 Years Original Citizen's U.S. Warranty. Citizen Calibre 9000 Minute Repeater Two-Tone Steel Men's Watch BL9004-58P

Whether you're heading to a formal event or a casual outing, Al Batal is versatile enough to complement any occasion. Its unique blend of notes ensures that you will leave a memorable impression, no matter where you are.

Available exclusively for shipment within the Contiguous United States and Canada, this fragrance is a must-have addition to any discerning man's collection. Experience the allure of Al Batal and let your presence be known.

description.complete:

Introduced in 1990, this captivating fragrance is a sophisticated blend of delicate florals and warm, sensual notes, creating an unforgettable scent that embodies grace and femininity.

Designed by the renowned Marilyn Miglin, Destiny is a fragrance that celebrates confidence and sophistication. Whether you're heading to a special event or simply want to indulge in everyday luxury, this 3.4 oz Eau de Parfum spray is the perfect addition to your fragrance collection. name: Aqualis Unisex Orion Parfum 1.7 oz Fragrances 0604565312709
description.complete:
Discover the captivating allure of Aqualis Orion, a unisex parfum that transcends the ordinary. Launched in 2020, this exquisite fragrance belongs to the Amber Floral family, offering a harmonious blend of rich and diverse notes.

At the top, Orion greets you with the delicate embrace of rose, sweet notes, jasmine, and an intriguing hint of spices. These elements create an inviting and enchanting opening that sets the stage for a deeper olfactory journey.

The heart of this fragrance reveals a luxurious mix of saffron, agarwood (oud), patchouli, sandalwood, and tobacco. These robust and earthy notes lend a sophisticated and exotic character to the scent, making it ideal for those who appreciate complexity and depth.

As the scent settles, the base notes of bourbon vanilla, amber, musk, animal notes, and cedar provide a warm and lasting finish. This combination ensures that Orion lingers on the skin, leaving a memorable impression.

Housed in a sleek 1.7 oz bottle, Aqualis Orion Parfum is not just a fragrance, but a statement piece. With its unique barcode 0604565312709, it guarantees authenticity and exclusivity. Please note that this item is only available for shipment within the Contiguous United States & Canada.

Experience the timeless elegance and enchanting aroma of Aqualis Orion. Elevate your fragrance collection with this unisex gem that promises to leave a lasting impression.

description.complete:
Introducing the captivating allure of Min New York's Blackstar, a unisex fragrance that defies conventions and invites you to explore a world of olfactory wonder. Launched in 2022 as part of the esteemed Scent Stories Vol. 3 collection, Blackstar stands out as a masterpiece in the leather fragrance family. With its artful blend of top notes, heart notes, and base notes, this fragrance is a symphony for the senses.

Blackstar opens with the vibrant and playful top notes of raspberry, tea, and incense. The sweet and tangy raspberry mingles seamlessly with the soothing aroma of tea, while the smoky touch of incense adds an air of mystery and intrigue. This intriguing start sets the stage for the heart of the fragrance, where patchouli, rose, and lily of the valley create a harmonious and elegant bouquet. The earthy richness of patchouli blends beautifully with the romantic scent of rose, and the delicate sweetness of lily of the valley adds a touch of freshness.

As the fragrance unfolds, it reveals a robust base of woodsy notes, chypre notes, musk, and leather. This deep and enduring foundation ensures that Blackstar leaves a lasting impression. The woodsy and chypre notes provide a rich and textured backdrop, while the musky undertones add warmth and sensuality. Finally, the leather notes lend an unmistakable strength and sophistication, making Blackstar a truly unforgettable scent.

Packaged in a sleek 2.5 oz bottle, this EDP spray is perfect for those who appreciate the finer things in life. Min New York's Blackstar is more than just a fragrance; it's an experience that tells a story every time you wear it. Whether you're heading to a special event or simply want to make everyday moments extraordinary, this fragrance is your perfect companion. Discover the magic of Blackstar and let its unique blend of notes transport you to a realm of elegance and allure.

description.complete:

Whether you're heading to a crucial business meeting or a casual dinner with friends, Efolia Men's Grey Stone EDP Spray adds that final touch to your look. Join the league of men who don't just smell good but leave an indelible mark with their scent. Experience Efolia's Grey Stone today.

name: Seksy Entice by Seksy for Women - 3.52 oz EDP Spray
description.complete:
Introducing Seksy Entice by Seksy, a captivating fragrance designed exclusively for ladies. This enchanting scent is a harmonious blend of elegance and allure, perfect for any occasion. Crafted by the renowned design house of Seksy, Seksy Entice is an exquisite Eau de Parfum (EDP) spray that comes in a generous 3.52 oz size, ensuring you can enjoy its delightful aroma for longer.

The fragrance opens with a burst of invigorating top notes, featuring the zesty freshness of mandarin, the sweet succulence of apricot, and the rich depth of blackcurrant. These notes create an immediate sense of energy and vibrance, setting the stage for the heart of the perfume.

At its core, Seksy Entice reveals a bouquet of heart notes that exude sophistication and grace. The romantic essence of jasmine and rose is intertwined with the delicate floral notes of orange blossom, offering a timeless and elegant scent that captivates the senses.

The base notes of sandalwood, amber, and vanilla provide a warm and comforting finish to this fragrance. The creamy richness of sandalwood, combined with the sensual allure of amber and the sweet touch of vanilla, creates a lasting impression that is both luxurious and inviting.

Seksy Entice is more than just a fragrance; it's an experience that embodies femininity and charm. Whether you're heading to a special event or simply want to elevate your everyday style, this perfume is the perfect choice. Its unique blend of notes ensures a versatile scent that transitions seamlessly from day to night.

With its chic design and captivating aroma, Seksy Entice by Seksy is a must-have addition to any perfume collection. Its barcode, 5060423390497, ensures authenticity and quality, making it an ideal gift for yourself or a loved one. Experience the enticing allure of Seksy Entice and let your senses be enchanted by its irresistible charm.

description.complete:
Experience the timeless allure of Parfums Vintage's Brutus Aoud, a distinguished scent crafted for the modern man. This exquisite Eau de Parfum Spray, available in a generous 3.4 oz size, captures the essence of sophistication and elegance. Designed in the United Kingdom, Brutus Aoud is a testament to the artistry of Parfums Vintage, a brand renowned for its luxurious fragrances.

These invigorating citrus accents seamlessly transition into the heart of the fragrance, where the delicate floral harmony of rose, jasmine, and ylang ylang unfolds. Brutus Aoud by Parfums Vintage is more than just a fragrance; it's an expression of style and confidence. Ideal for any occasion, this men's fragrance is sure to leave a lasting impression. Please note that this item is only valid for shipment within the Contiguous United States and Canada.

name: Lorientale Fragrances Men's Evanos EDP 3.4 oz Fragrances 6291104734326
description.complete:
Introducing the essence of masculine elegance and adventure, Lorientale Fragrances proudly presents its latest olfactory masterpiece - Evanos for Men. This exquisite Eau de Parfum, encapsulated in a generous 3.4 oz bottle, is a symphony of aromas that speaks to the soul of the modern man. With a unique barcode 6291104734326, Evanos is not just a scent; it's an identity.

Embark on a sensory journey as Evanos opens with a vibrant burst of top notes, including the freshness of Pineapple and Lemon, the zest of Bergamot, the depth of Black currant, and the crispness of Apple. This lively introduction sets the stage for a heart deeply rooted in sophistication, where the smoky allure of Birch harmonizes with the delicate fragrances of Jasmine and Rose. The experience culminates in a rich base of Musk, Ambergris, Patchouli, and Vanilla, leaving a lasting impression that is both warm and captivating.

Designed by the esteemed house of Lorientale Fragrances, Evanos is more than a perfume; it is an emblem of strength, charisma, and sensuality. Each spray is a testament to the adventurous spirit of the wearer, making it the perfect companion for the man who is unafraid to express his individuality and style. Whether it's for a day at the office, a romantic evening, or a night out with friends, Evanos adds a touch of mystery and allure to any occasion.

With Evanos, Lorientale Fragrances invites you to explore a world where tradition meets modernity, and elegance knows no bounds. This Eau de Parfum, specifically crafted for men, is a tribute to those who dare to stand out. Experience the power of Evanos and let it guide you through each chapter of your story with confidence and grace.

description.complete:

Crafted specifically for ladies, this 3.4 oz EDP Spray is a captivating addition to any perfume collection. Belonging to the aromatic spicy family, the Nordic King by Parfums Vintage is more than just a scent; it's an experience. Whether you're at a formal event or a casual gathering, this fragrance adapts seamlessly to any setting, making it an essential addition to your collection.

description.complete:
Discover the captivating allure of Saint Hilaire's Iris Absolu, a unisex fragrance launched in 2020 that perfectly embodies the essence of elegance and sophistication. This aromatic spicy scent is a harmonious blend of rich and intriguing notes, designed to leave a lasting impression.

At the top, the fragrance opens with the exotic and invigorating spice of cardamom, setting the stage for a sensory journey. name: Azha Men's Mountaineer EDP Spray 3.3 oz Fragrances 6629021040501
description.complete:
Introducing the Azha Mountaineer EDP Spray, a captivating fragrance launched in 2023. This men's fragrance belongs to the Woody Aromatic family, making it an ideal choice for those who appreciate both sophistication and rugged charm.

The scent opens with invigorating top notes of Bergamot, Galbanum, and Lemon, creating a fresh and zesty introduction. As the fragrance develops, the heart notes of Jasmine and Woody notes unfold, adding depth and complexity. Finally, the base notes of Ambergris, Moss, and Musk provide a long-lasting and memorable finish.

Designed by the renowned house of Azha, the Mountaineer EDP Spray is perfect for the modern man who seeks adventure and elegance. The 3.3 oz bottle is just the right size for daily use or special occasions, ensuring you always leave a lasting impression.

Experience the allure of nature with Azha's Mountaineer, a fragrance that embodies strength, elegance, and the spirit of the great outdoors. Elevate your scent game with this exceptional EDP spray and make a statement wherever you go.

name: Risala Unisex Elite Eleganzia Pure EDP Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 6294015196962
description.complete:
Experience the art of fine fragrance with Risala Elite Eleganzia Pure, a captivating Eau de Parfum that blends sophistication with timeless allure. Crafted in the heart of the United Arab Emirates, this exquisite scent embodies the rich traditions of Middle Eastern perfumery while offering a modern, refreshing twist.

Elite Eleganzia Pure opens with a vibrant burst of bergamot and mandarin, delivering a fresh and invigorating first impression. As the fragrance evolves, the heart reveals an enchanting fusion of green tea and black currant, creating a refined balance of crispness and subtle sweetness. Finally, the base notes leave a lasting impression, with warm musk, smooth sandalwood, and the earthy depth of petitgrain oil and galbanum, wrapping you in an aura of sophistication.

Designed as a unisex fragrance, Elite Eleganzia Pure is perfect for those who appreciate versatility and elegance in their scent collection. Whether worn during the day or for an evening out, this Eau de Parfum offers an effortlessly luxurious experience that lingers beautifully on the skin.

Encased in a sleek and stylish bottle, this 3.4 oz EDP Spray is a must-have for fragrance connoisseurs who seek quality and distinction. Elevate your fragrance wardrobe with Risala Elite Eleganzia Pure and indulge in a scent that speaks of refinement, class, and timeless charm.

name: Canali Men's Canali Gift Set Fragrances 5391512270735
description.complete:
Experience the timeless elegance of the Canali Men's Canali Gift Set, a masterful creation from the renowned design house of Canali. Launched in 2005, this sophisticated fragrance embodies the essence of masculinity and refinement, making it the perfect choice for the modern man.

The Canali fragrance opens with a captivating blend of top notes, including Nutmeg, Pineapple, Mandarin orange, Cardamom, Orange, Apple, Coriander, and Bergamot. These vibrant and invigorating scents set the stage for the heart notes, where the delicate aromas of Orange blossom, Violet, Lily, and Jasmine unfold, adding a touch of floral allure.

As the fragrance settles, the base notes of Leather, Iris, Musk, Cedar, Sandalwood, Vetiver, and Tonka bean create a lasting impression. This harmonious combination of woody, floral, and musk elements results in a fragrance that is both versatile and memorable, perfect for any occasion.

The Canali Men's Canali Gift Set includes everything you need to indulge in this exquisite scent. The set features an Eau de Toilette (EDT) 1.7 oz, After Shave Balm (ASB) 1.7 oz, Shower Gel 8.4 oz, and Deodorant Stick 2.55 oz. Each product is designed to enhance the longevity and depth of the fragrance, ensuring you feel refreshed and confident throughout the day.

With its sophisticated scent profile and luxurious packaging, the Canali Men's Canali Gift Set makes an ideal gift for yourself or a loved one. Embrace the art of fine fragrance with this exceptional set from Canali, where tradition meets modernity in every spray.

name: Marmol & Son Ladies Catwoman EDT Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 647393957209
description.complete:
Bring out the captivating allure of the modern woman with the Marmol and Son's Catwoman fragrance. Designed specifically for ladies, this enchanting scent will make you feel empowered, confident, and irresistibly feminine. With a size of 3.4 oz, this EDT spray is perfect for those who want to embody their inner Catwoman every day.

The fragrance was launched in 2014 by the reputable design house, Marmol & Son. Since then, it has been making waves in the perfume industry for its unique and mesmerizing blend of scents. The Catwoman EDT Spray is more than just a fragrance; it's a statement of elegance and sophistication.

From the first spritz, your senses will be awakened by the top notes of Violet, Bergamot, and Red berry. This combination creates a fresh, invigorating aroma that will leave you feeling revitalized. As the day progresses, the heart notes of Plum, Jasmine, and Freesia subtly emerge. These scents add a sweet, floral undertone to the fragrance, giving it a romantic, feminine touch.

As the fragrance settles on your skin, the base notes of Sandalwood, Amber, and Musk come into play. These scents create a warm, sensual aroma that lingers on your skin, making for a captivating and long-lasting fragrance. This blend of scents makes the Catwoman EDT Spray a versatile fragrance that can be worn for any occasion.

With a barcode of 647393957209, this ladies' Catwoman EDT Spray from Marmol & Son is the ultimate fragrance for the modern woman. Its unique blend of scents, designed to invoke the spirit of the iconic Catwoman, will undeniably leave a lasting impression. Experience the magic of this fragrance and add a touch of mystique to your everyday life.

This item is only valid for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada.

name: Chic 'n Glam Ladies Dark Desired EDP Spray 3.4 oz Fragrances 5425017735724
description.complete:
Introducing Dark Desired by Chic 'n Glam, a captivating fragrance designed exclusively for ladies. This enchanting perfume comes in a generous 3.4 oz size, perfect for those who crave a scent that lingers beautifully throughout the day.

Dark Desired belongs to the Floral Fruity Gourmand fragrance family, offering a delightful blend of notes that are both alluring and sophisticated. The top notes feature a refreshing mix of Bergamot, Lemon, Orange, Cherry, Peach, and Caramel, creating a vibrant and sweet opening that instantly captivates the senses.

The heart notes of this exquisite perfume reveal a floral bouquet of Sambac Jasmine, Rose, and Geranium, complemented by the earthy richness of Patchouly. This harmonious blend adds depth and complexity, making Dark Desired a truly unforgettable scent.

As the fragrance settles, it unveils its base notes of Musk, Tonka Beans, and Vanilla. These warm and creamy undertones provide a lasting impression, ensuring you leave a trail of elegance wherever you go.

Chic 'n Glam has crafted Dark Desired with meticulous attention to detail, resulting in a perfume that exudes luxury and sophistication. Whether you're heading to a special event or simply want to elevate your everyday style, this scent is the perfect choice.

Elevate your fragrance collection with Chic 'n Glam's Dark Desired EDP Spray, a scent that's as unique and captivating as you are. Indulge in the essence of elegance and make every moment unforgettable.

description.complete:
Experience a unique and captivating scent with Lavender EDP Spray by Franck Boclet. This unisex fragrance, launched in 2017, is a perfect blend of enchanting aromas that will leave you feeling fresh and invigorated all day long.

The fragrance kicks off with the invigorating top notes of kumquat, cumin, and bergamot. This refreshing blend creates an immediate impression, stimulating your senses and setting a lively tone. Following this, the heart notes of lavender, cinnamon, apple, and wormwood come into play, creating a fascinating and comforting middle that is both calming and warming.

The base notes of tonka bean, amber, patchouli, and cedar round off this delightful scent, adding a touch of mystery and depth. These deeper, woody tones create a lasting impression, ensuring the fragrance lingers long after you've left the room.

Designed by the house of Franck Boclet, known for their exclusive and exquisite fragrances, Lavender EDP Spray is a testament to their craft. With a size of 3.4 oz, this perfume is perfect for daily use or for those special occasions, making it a versatile addition to your fragrance collection.

The Lavender EDP Spray by Franck Boclet, with its unique blend of scents, is a fragrance that transcends gender. This unisex perfume is a perfect choice for individuals who value individuality and sophistication. With a barcode of 3575070044614, this is an authentic product that guarantees quality and longevity.

Immerse yourself in the world of Franck Boclet with the Lavender EDP Spray. This unisex fragrance is not just a perfume; it's an experience that will take your senses on a journey of freshness and tranquility.

name: Map Of The Heart Unisex V.1 Freedom EDP 1.0 oz Fragrances 9348939000731
description.complete:
Discover a fragrance that embodies the essence of liberty with Map Of The Heart's V.1 Freedom. This unisex Eau de Parfum is a captivating blend that invites you on a sensory journey through nature's most vibrant landscapes. Perfectly crafted for those who cherish freedom and adventure, this scent is a harmonious blend of freshness and warmth.

The fragrance opens with invigorating top notes of citrus, green leaves, and blackcurrant, creating an immediate sense of energy and renewal. As you delve deeper, the heart of the fragrance reveals a mesmerizing blend of watery notes, the delicate floral touch of Tunisian neroli, the powdery elegance of orris, and the soft allure of peony. These heart notes evoke a serene aquatic floral experience that is both refreshing and sophisticated.

As the scent settles, it leaves a lasting impression with its base notes. The grounding essence of white cedar wood and Australian sandalwood is intertwined with the mysterious and smoky aroma of incense and the comforting warmth of musks. This rich, earthy foundation provides a sense of depth and tranquility, perfect for any occasion.

Belonging to the Floral Aquatic fragrance family, V.1 Freedom is a testament to Map Of The Heart's commitment to creating scents that resonate with the soul. The 1.0 oz bottle is perfect for those on the go, ensuring your favorite fragrance is always within reach. Please note that this item is available for shipment only within the Contiguous United States and Canada.

name: Ocean Pacific Ladies Beach Paradise EDP 3.4 oz Fragrances 819029015861
description.complete:
Step into a world of serene elegance with Ocean Pacific’s Beach Paradise, a floral fragrance crafted exclusively for ladies. Launched in 2004 by the renowned design house Ocean Pacific, nestled in the United States, this enchanting scent captures the essence of a tranquil beach getaway.

Beach Paradise opens with a harmonious blend of magnolia and violet, creating a refreshing and inviting introduction. As the fragrance unfolds, the heart notes of waterlily, hibiscus, and honeysuckle transport you to a lush floral garden by the sea, offering a sense of calm and rejuvenation. The journey concludes with the warm, comforting base notes of white amber and musk, leaving an unforgettable, lingering trail.

This Eau de Parfum spray, sized at 3.4 oz, is designed for women who embrace their love for floral scents. Perfect for daily wear or special occasions, Beach Paradise by Ocean Pacific is your go-to fragrance for an air of sophistication and grace.

Packaged with elegance and a touch of coastal charm, this fragrance is ideal for gifting or treating oneself. Please note that Ocean Pacific Beach Paradise is only available for shipment within the Contiguous United States and Canada.

This item is only valid for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada.

name: Hummer Chrome Men / Hummer EDT Spray 4.2 oz (125 ml) (m)
description.complete:
Introducing Hummer Chrome Men by Hummer, a captivating fragrance designed for men who appreciate bold and sophisticated scents. Launched in 2004, this aromatic spicy fragrance has been a favorite among discerning gentlemen for nearly two decades. With a generous size of 4.2 oz, this EDT spray ensures you can enjoy its invigorating aroma for an extended period.

Hummer Chrome Men opens with an intriguing blend of cardamom, caraway, and pimento. These top notes create an initial burst of freshness and spice that is both invigorating and energizing. As the scent develops, the heart notes of leather, sandalwood, amber, and patchouli emerge, adding depth and warmth to the fragrance. Finally, the base notes of tonka bean and thyme provide a lasting, earthy finish that lingers on the skin.

Crafted by the renowned design house Hummer, known for its iconic car brand, this fragrance embodies strength, confidence, and adventure. The aromatic spicy family ensures a versatile scent that can be worn for any occasion, making it an excellent addition to any man's grooming collection.

Don't miss out on the opportunity to experience Hummer Chrome Men in its full glory. Available exclusively for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada, this fragrance is perfect for those who want to make a statement. Elevate your scent game with Hummer Chrome Men by Hummer, and embrace the essence of rugged sophistication.

description.complete:
Discover the timeless elegance of Iskander by Parfum D'Empire, a captivating unisex fragrance launched in 2006. This exquisite scent, part of the Woody Chypre family, is perfect for those who appreciate the finer things in life. Designed by the niche fragrance brand Parfum D'Empire from France, Iskander stands out with its unique blend of top, heart, and base notes.

At the top, Iskander opens with a refreshing burst of Citron, Amalfi lemon, Grapefruit, Tarragon, Virginia cedar, Mandarin orange, and Orange. Parfum D'Empire's commitment to quality and artistry is evident in every aspect of Iskander. This luxurious fragrance is more than just a scent; it's an experience that transports you to a world of elegance and charm. Ideal for both men and women, Iskander is a versatile addition to any fragrance collection.

Exclusively available for shipment within the Contiguous United States and Canada, the Parfum D'Empire Unisex Iskander EDP 1.7 oz is a must-have for fragrance connoisseurs. Embrace the allure of Iskander and let its enchanting aroma become your signature scent.

name: Alyssa Ashley Musk / Alyssa Ashley Eau Parfumee Cologne Spray 3.4 oz (100 ml) (U)
description.complete:
Since its launch in 1969, Alyssa Ashley Musk by the renowned design house Alyssa Ashley has captivated fragrance enthusiasts with its timeless allure. This unisex Eau Parfumee Cologne Spray, available in a generous 3.4 oz (100 ml) size, is a delightful blend of floral, woody, and musk notes, making it a versatile addition to any fragrance collection.

The fragrance opens with a refreshing burst of bergamot, setting the stage for a heart that blooms with the enchanting aromas of ylang-ylang, jasmine, rose, and geranium. These floral heart notes beautifully complement the base of musk, tonka bean, iris, and oak moss, creating a scent that is both sophisticated and comforting.

Alyssa Ashley Musk is perfect for those who appreciate a balanced fragrance that combines the freshness of florals with the warmth of woody and musk undertones. Its unique composition makes it suitable for all occasions, whether you're heading to a business meeting or a casual outing.

Experience the lasting elegance of Alyssa Ashley Musk, a fragrance that transcends trends and continues to be a favorite among discerning individuals. Please note that this item is only valid for shipment within the Contiguous United States and Canada.

description.complete:
Step into a world of vibrant freshness and captivating allure with the Adidas Ladies Uplft EDT Spray, a mesmerizing floral-woody-musk scent that was launched in 2019. This fragrance is an exquisite blend of lush green notes, zesty yellow mandarin, and intriguing bitter orange that kick off its top notes, offering a refreshing and invigorating start.

In its heart, the unique blend of mahonial, aldehydes, and fruits unfurls, creating a harmonious union with the delicate notes of lily-of-the-valley and rose. These heart notes exude a delightful sweetness that beautifully complements the initial citrusy freshness, capturing the essence of feminine elegance and grace.

As the fragrance settles, it reveals its alluring base of cedar, cosmone, and musk. These warm, woody undertones create a luscious, long-lasting aroma that leaves a captivating trail wherever you go. The Uplft EDT Spray is a testament to Adidas's commitment to creating distinctive fragrances that embody the spirit of the modern woman.

This 3.3 oz fragrance comes in a stylish spray bottle, ensuring a consistent application every time. Its subtle elegance and timeless appeal make it the perfect choice for everyday wear, whether you're heading to the office or enjoying a casual day out. With the Adidas Ladies Uplft EDT Spray, you're not just wearing a fragrance, you're making a statement.

Designed by the renowned design house of Adidas, this fragrance truly stands out in the crowd. Its unique scent profile, combined with its impressive longevity and sillage, makes the Adidas Ladies Uplft EDT Spray 3.3 oz a must-have addition to every fragrance collection. name: Geparlys Ladies Blooming  Delice EDP 3.4 oz Fragrances 3700134410627
description.complete:
Introducing the epitome of elegance and femininity, Geparlys presents the Blooming Delice Eau de Parfum for Ladies. This exquisite fragrance, housed in a 3.4 oz bottle, is a symphony of scents designed to captivate and enchant. With a unique blend of top, heart, and base notes, Blooming Delice promises an unforgettable aromatic journey that celebrates the essence of womanhood.

The adventure begins with an invigorating burst of Galbanum leaves, Cinnamon leaves, Bergamot, and Lemon. This vibrant opening sets the stage for a heart filled with the rich and voluptuous floral notes of Tuberose, Jasmine, Honeysuckle, Freesia, and Lilies of the valley. name: Rayhaan Men's Ellwood EDP Spray 3.38 oz Fragrances 6298044158250
description.complete:
Introducing Rayhaan's Ellwood EDP Spray, a distinguished fragrance crafted especially for men. This 3.38 oz bottle encapsulates a woody scent family, offering a sophisticated aroma that is both captivating and enduring.

Ellwood opens with a refreshing blend of top notes, including the zesty essence of Bergamot from Italy, the crispness of Apple, the invigorating hint of Mint, and the exotic touch of Elemi from the Philippines. These initial notes create a vibrant and energetic introduction that captures attention immediately.

As the fragrance develops, the heart notes unfold, revealing a harmonious blend of Jasmine, Rose, Patchouli from Indonesia, and Sandalwood. This rich combination adds depth and complexity, balancing floral elegance with earthy undertones to create a truly mesmerizing scent.

The base notes of Ellwood provide a lasting impression, featuring the robust and grounding aromas of Oakmoss, Musk, Amber, and Cedar from Virginia. These elements merge seamlessly to offer a warm and enduring finish that lingers on the skin, making it an ideal choice for any occasion.

Designed by the esteemed house of Rayhaan, Ellwood stands out not only for its exquisite fragrance but also for its elegant packaging, making it a perfect gift or a luxurious addition to your personal collection. The convenient 3.38 oz size ensures you can enjoy this enchanting scent wherever you go.

Rayhaan Men's Ellwood EDP Spray is available exclusively for shipment within the Contiguous United States and Canada. Indulge in the timeless allure of Ellwood and experience the perfect blend of sophistication and charm.

description.complete:
Dive into a world of floral freshness with Sergio Tacchini's Ladies O.Zone EDT Spray. Launched in the year 2000, this captivating fragrance has been delighting senses for over two decades. It belongs to the Floral Green fragrance family, a categorization that perfectly encapsulates its essence.

As you spritz this fragrance, you are first hit with the top notes of zesty Lemon, Bergamot, and Orange. These citrusy notes introduce an invigorating, sparkling burst that instantly uplifts the mood. Then, as the fragrance matures on your skin, it seamlessly transitions into the heart notes of soothing Chamomile, aromatic Lavender, delicate Lily-of-the-valley, exotic Jasmine, and romantic Rose. This symphony of floral notes adds a touch of elegance and femininity to the perfume.

Finally, the base notes of refreshing Green tea and warm Cedar emerge, grounding the fragrance and adding a touch of earthy depth to its overall profile. The result is a well-rounded, floral green scent that is perfect for the modern lady who appreciates classic elegance mixed with a contemporary twist.

Designed by the renowned design house, Sergio Tacchini, the O.Zone EDT spray comes in a convenient 1.0 oz size. This makes it perfect for both everyday use and for tucking into a handbag for a quick refresh on the go. Wrapped up in a bottle with a barcode of 8300186909367, this fragrant delight makes for a charming gift or a splendid addition to your fragrance collection.

Experience the captivating allure of Sergio Tacchini's Ladies O.Zone EDT Spray. It's more than just a fragrance; it's an olfactory journey that leaves a lasting impression.

name: Rasasi Unisex Radi EDP 3.4 oz Fragrances 614514261088
description.complete:
Introducing Rasasi's latest masterpiece, Radi, launched in 2022. This exceptional fragrance belongs to the Floral Fruity family, making it perfect for anyone who loves a vibrant and refreshing scent. Crafted meticulously by the renowned Middle Eastern design house of Rasasi, Radi is a unisex Eau de Parfum (EDP) spray that comes in a generous 3.4 oz size.

The top notes of Radi are a delightful blend of orange, lemon, and bergamot, providing an invigorating citrusy start that awakens the senses. As the fragrance settles, the heart notes reveal a bouquet of flower petals, peach, and cherry, creating a harmonious and sweet middle layer. Finally, the base notes of amber add a warm and lasting finish, ensuring the scent lingers pleasantly throughout the day.

Radi embodies the essence of sophistication and elegance, making it a standout addition to any fragrance collection. Its unique composition and luxurious appeal cater to both men and women, marking it as a truly versatile and inclusive scent.

With a SKU of FS261008 and a barcode of 614514261088, Rasasi's Radi EDP is available for shipment exclusively within the Contiguous United States & Canada. Elevate your fragrance game with Radi, and experience the enchanting allure of this Floral Fruity delight.

This item is only valid for shipment in the Contiguous United States & Canada.

name: Haus of Brilliance 18K Rose Gold 1 1/3 Cttw Diamond Studded Fleur De Lis Trellis Style Drop and Dangle Earring (F-G Color, VS1-VS2 Clarity)
description.complete: Give your earrings a charming trip to Paris with these Diamond Fleur-de-lis Earring Charms in 18K Rose Gold. These drop and dangle earrings are crafted from elegant 18K Rose Gold and set with over 200 natural diamonds for a brilliant sparkle. The earrings themselves are meticulously crafted and feature multiple design motifs including a floral pattern at the bottom. The diamonds are set in a combination of pave and bezel set diamonds for exquisite sparkle. The design works itself up to the namesake Fleur-de-lis bales that sit at the top. Belonging to the floral fragrance family, Mystique opens with a radiant burst of orange blossom, zesty lemon, and sweet orange, creating an invigorating first impression. The heart unfolds into a delicate bouquet of white flowers, exotic tiare flower, and neroli, adding a soft, feminine charm. Finally, the scent settles into a warm and earthy base of patchouli and oakmoss, leaving a lasting and unforgettable trail.

Crafted by the renowned design house Beverly Hills Polo Club, this fragrance embodies timeless elegance and effortless style. Designed for ladies who appreciate refinement, Mystique is a versatile scent that transitions seamlessly from day to night. Whether you're stepping into a busy workday or an enchanting evening, this Eau de Parfum will enhance your presence with its captivating aroma.

Encased in a sleek and stylish 3.38 oz bottle, Mystique not only smells exquisite but also makes a beautiful addition to any fragrance collection. Experience the allure of Beverly Hills Polo Club Ladies Mystique and let your confidence shine with every spritz.

Step into a world of bold elegance with Lattafa’s Khamrah Dukhan Eau de Parfum Spray for Men. Released in 2025, this 3.4 oz fragrance blends rich tradition with a modern twist, making it the perfect signature scent for the confident man.
